metadata.description: Universal skills for cross-project agent workflows. Most reference skills are gated in _incubator/ pending a quality review pass (see docs/skill-review/). Active: Doppler secrets and external skill intake. Experimental/untested: skill-injector.

plugins.name: frozen-skills
plugins.description: Reviewed active skills: Doppler secrets management and external skill intake. Other reference skills are gated in _incubator/ pending review (see docs/skill-review/).

plugins.name: skill-injector
plugins.description: WIP, UNTESTED: prompt-submit hook that injects a relevant-skill suggestion + a subagent-prompt quality gate. Review/test before installing or enabling.
